rulings.Case Title: THOMAS B GAINES et al VS. JOHNSON & JOHNSON, A NEW JERSEY CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S Ruling At Summary Adjudication Re Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 12, 2009, line 5, PLAINTIFFS THOMAS GAINES, DIANA GAINES, GARY GAINES Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court's Ruling At Summary Adjudication Re Punitive Damages. MOTION DENIED. MOTION IMPROPER UNDER CCP SECTION 1008 WHICH PROVIDES THAT IT BE MADE AFTER SERVICE UPON THE PARTY OF A WRITTEN NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER. NO SHOWING OF NEW OR DIFFERENT FACTS, CIRCUMSTANCES, OR LAW. =(302/CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: GUY DOWNING et al VS. YANNOULA KOLIATSIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 12, 2009, line 11, PLAINTIFFS GUY DOWNING AND JAMES SNIDLE'S Motion For Attorneys' Fees. MOTION GRANTED. REASONABLE AND NECESSARY ATTORNEYS' FEES AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $11,660.44. THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT CONTROL. THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTIONS WERE RELATED, BASED ON NONPAYMENT, AND CONSTITUTED A CONTINUOUS SERIES OF EVENTS SUBJECT TO THE ATTORNEY FEE PROVISION IN THE STIPULATION AT PARAGRAPH 22. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: SILVER SHIELD, LLC VS. JASWINDER SINGH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 12, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT JASWINDER SINGH'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. MOTION GRANTED. =(302/CWW/PB)

Set for hearing on Tuesday, May 12, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT MARK ARELLANES MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. MOTION GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS FILED THIS MOTION WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME, DEMONSTRATED EXCUSABLE NEGLECT GIVEN DEFENDANTS' CIRCUMSTANCES, AND PROVIDED A PROPOSED ANSWER. CCP SECTION 473. =(302/CWW/PB)
